zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn於大約1396年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾利安萊爾時，他的父親Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd21歲，母親Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd17歲。他和Annes Verch Dafydd至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn于大约1396年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾利安萊爾时，他的父亲Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd21岁，母亲Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd17岁。他和Annes Verch Dafydd至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn was born about 1396, in Llanwrthwl, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Annes Verch Dafydd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn um 1396 in Llanwrthwl, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd 21 und seine Mutter Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd 17. Er hatte mit Annes Verch Dafydd mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Chwith ap Llywelynが約1396年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアランウルスウルで生まれた時，父Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafyddは21歳，母Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafyddは17歳であった。彼はAnnes Verch Dafyddとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1396년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜르스w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Annes Verch Dafydd(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Chwith ap Llywelyn родился около 1396 г. в местности лланртвл, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywelyn " Ddu" ap Dafydd было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Llywelyn Ddu ap Dafydd, 17.
